description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a short, dark metallic barrel and a wooden grip. The barrels are smooth and cylindrical, with a glossy black finish that reflects light. The grip is curved and made of a dark brown wood, ergonomically shaped for handheld use. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger area. The overall design is minimalistic, lacking a full stock and instead utilizing a pistol grip for maneuverability. There are no visible pump or lever mechanisms, and the break-action hinge is subtly integrated into the body.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a glossy black finish and a dark wooden pistol grip. It features a rounded trigger guard and a minimalistic, stockless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned side-by-side, with the muzzle openings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the short, glossy barrels and the curved wooden pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip and the twin barrels extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the barrels and grip, with the break-action hinge area visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, smooth and glossy, short length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
